title: Timeline Automations

posts.author: Davedvine (Dave Vineburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to sync google calendar with a timeline column?

If not, I need to be able to push the start and end dates from the items timeline to date columns then set up an automation/integration to send the details over to google calander

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

The Timeline Column is not currently supported with the Google Calendar integration. As a workaround, perhaps you could use two Date Columns for your integration? Is this what you were referring to?

Let us know if you need any guidance setting this up! We’re always happy to help!
